welcome:
🎮 **Welcome to {app_name}!**

This bot helps you browse the best CODM weapon attachments.

🔹 Choose an option from the menu below:
settings.user.title: ⚙️ Bot Settings
mode.label: Mode
weapon.label: Weapon
category.label: Category
leaderboard.title: Top Users (Leaderboard)
leaderboard.empty: 😔 No users on the leaderboard yet.
leaderboard.footer_hint: Earn points by submitting quality attachments and being active!
weapon.keyboard_prompt: You can use the buttons below.
contact.menu.title: 📞 Contact Us
contact.menu.desc: Choose one of the following options to get support:
contact.menu.help_lines:
🎫 New Ticket — report an issue or ask a question
📋 My Tickets — view your tickets
❓ FAQ — frequently asked questions
⭐ Feedback — send your feedback
💬 Direct Contact — chat with support

contact.faq.prompt: Tap a question to view the answer:

Please write your comment or suggestion:

contact.feedback.submit.success:
✅ Your feedback has been submitted
🙏 Thank you!
contact.feedback.submit.error: ❌ Failed to submit feedback. Please try again.

⭐ **Top Attachments for {weapon}**

Please enter the ticket subject in one short sentence:
(e.g., "Error showing AK47 attachment")

Please describe your issue/request in detail:

💡 Tips:
• The more details, the faster the response
• You can attach a screenshot if needed
contact.ticket.description.too_short: ❌ Description must be at least {n} characters. Please provide more details:

🖼️ **Image (optional)**

Would you like to attach an image?
contact.image.send:
📸 **Send Image**

Please send the desired image:
contact.ticket.error: ❌ Failed to submit the ticket. Please try again.
contact.my_tickets.title: 📋 **My Tickets**
contact.my_tickets.empty: You have not submitted any tickets yet.
help.text:
📖 **Help**

🔫 Get Attachments: Category → Weapon → Mode (BR/MP) → Top or All

💡 Suggested: Curated recommendations for each weapon

⭐ Season Top: Season-best attachments with images and codes

⚙️ Settings: HUD, Basic, Sensitivity per BR/MP

🔍 Search: Type weapon name or attachment code

📞 Support: Tickets, FAQ and feedback

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💡 Tip: Codes are different in BR and MP. Search them in-game.

Good luck!
season.title: ⭐ **Season Top - {mode}**
suggested.title: 💡 **Suggested Attachments - {mode}**
ua.title: 🎮 **User Attachments Section**
ua.description:
In this section you can:
• View other users' attachments
• Submit your own attachment
• Manage your attachments
feedback.prompt.write:
💬 Write your comment:
Please send your comment in one message (max 500 characters)

Send /cancel to abort.
feedback.too_long: ❌ Your comment is too long. Please keep it within 500 characters.
feedback.submit.success:
✅ Your comment has been submitted!
🙏 Thank you for your feedback.
feedback.submit.error: ❌ Error saving your comment! Please try again.
attachment.copy.inline_hint: 📋 Recorded, but the code is shown above. Tap/long-press to copy.
ua.report.duplicate: ⚠️ You have already reported this post.
ua.report.limit_reached: ⚠️ Maximum 5 reports per day. Please try again tomorrow.
ua.confirm.title: ✅ Final confirmation
ua.pending_after_submit: ⚠️ Your attachment will be published after admin approval.
ua.rate_limit:
⏳ Rate limit

Please wait 10 minutes and try again.
ua.daily_limit:
⏳ Daily limit

You have submitted {limit} attachments today.
Please try again tomorrow.
ua.error.no_active_modes:
⚠️ System temporarily unavailable
No active game modes.
This should be fixed soon by admins.

💬 You can contact us from 'Contact Us'.
ua.no_weapons:
📭 No weapons exist in this category.
Please select another category or contact admin.
ua.prompt.attachment_name:
📎 Attachment name

Please enter your attachment name:

💡 Examples:
• No Recoil
• Fast ADS
• Long Range
• All Round

⚠️ Name must be between 2 and 50 characters.

Send /cancel to abort.
ua.prompt.image:
🖼 Attachment image

Please send your attachment image:

⚠️ Tips:
• Image only (PNG, JPG)
• Good and clear quality
• No inappropriate content

Send /cancel to abort.
ua.error.image_required:
❌ Please send an image.

Send /cancel to abort.
ua.prompt.code:
📝 Attachment code

Please send your attachment code:

💡 Guide:
• Only weapon attachment codes (numbers)
• Example: 11221319812

⚠️ Max {max} characters

Send /skip to skip.
ua.error.code_too_long:
❌ Code is too long!
Maximum {max} characters allowed.
ua.prompt.description:
💬 Attachment description

Write a short description about this attachment:

💡 Examples:
• For long range
• Good for TDM
• Great recoil control

⚠️ Max {max} characters

Send /skip to skip.
ua.violation.description_try_again:
⚠️ {reason}

Please enter a proper description or send /skip:
ua.submit_success:
✅ Attachment successfully submitted!

📋 Status: Waiting for admin approval
🔔 We will notify you after approval.

Thanks for your contribution! 🙏
ua.save_error: ❌ Error saving attachment. Please try again.
ua.banned_simple: ❌ You have been banned from submitting attachments.
ua.violation.name_serious:
⚠️ Serious warning - Strike {strike}/3

{reason}

If repeated, your access will be revoked.
Please enter a proper name again:

This name will be shown instead of the User ID.

admin.notify.compose.help:
📣 **Broadcast Message**

👥 Active users: {count}

Please send one of the following:
• A text message (with or without Markdown)
• Or a photo with caption

💡 **Markdown Tips:**
• `*text*` for **bold**
• `_text_` for _italic_
• Use `\` before `*_` to escape

You can cancel at any time.
admin.notify.schedule.edit.title: 📝 **Edit Scheduled Message**
